project_templates-Verzeichnis erstellen und konfigurieren

ParentTag: epic-projektstruktur
Estimate: 16h

Acceptance Criteria:
- project_templates/ contains at least two template directories: cli-basic/ and ui-pyside6/.
- Each template dir contains metadata.yml with required keys (name,type,python_min,deps,description).
- project_templates/README.md documents how to pick and customize a template.

Dependencies (tags):
- epic-projektstruktur

Test Commands:
- `ls project_templates/`
- `cat project_templates/cli-basic/metadata.yml`
